name: Notional Staking liUSD4w
redeem: Notional Exponent vault share backed by infiniFi liUSD-4w. Exiting goes through Notional router/smart-withdrawal mechanics; the underlying liUSD-4w requires unbonding before receiving iUSD, and iUSD redemption to USDC depends on reserves or a redemption queue. Locked-iUSD is the junior first-loss tranche and can be slashed after realized protocol losses.
notes: Onchain asset is USDC and yieldToken is liUSD-4w. Adds Notional vault/router complexity on top of infiniFi fractional-reserve, 4-week locked exposure, queue risk, and first-loss/slashing mechanics.
